title: Document-Model Variant and VariantSet Spec Production Contract
summary: Format-neutral rules variant and variantSet specs must satisfy after parsing. Both USDA and USDC mapping productions cite this contract.

variantSet.name_rule: variantSet spec name matches the authored variant set name. The name is added to the parent prim's variantSetChildren list.

variantChildren.required: every variantSet spec carries this field; the value is the ordered list of authored variant spec names under this variantSet. Maintained by usd-document-model.

variant.name_rule: variant spec name matches the authored variant name. The name is added to the parent variantSet's variantChildren list.

specifier.required: always emitted on every variant spec; value is over

primChildren.required: every variant spec carries this field; the value is the ordered list of child prim spec names declared inside the variant.

propertyChildren.required: every variant spec carries this field; the value is the ordered list of child property names declared inside the variant.

variantSetChildren.required: every variant spec carries this field; the value is the ordered list of nested variantSet spec names.

nesting_rules.variantSet_must_have_prim_parent: A variantSet spec must be a child of a prim or variant spec; emitting a variantSet under a layer or under an attribute/relationship is a violation.
nesting_rules.variant_must_have_variantSet_parent: A variant spec must be a child of a variantSet spec.
nesting_rules.nested_variantSets_allowed: A variant spec may contain nested variantSet specs as children, with the same naming and child-list invariants.
nesting_rules.variantSetChildren_vs_variantSetNames: variantSetChildren on a prim or variant spec is the spec-storage list (which variantSet specs actually exist under this prim/variant). variantSetNames is authored composition metadata (a listOp<token> declaring which variant sets should compose). They must be maintained independently; the two sets may differ.

laws: variant set and variant specs are authored layer storage, not composition evaluation
variant contents (child prims, properties, nested variantSets) use the same document-model storage APIs as prim contents
variant specs must report specifier=over and leave typeName unauthored unless a future spec revision changes the storage rule
variant set specs maintain variantChildren in agreement with stored variant specs
containing prim specs maintain variantSetChildren in agreement with stored variantSet specs
variantSetChildren (spec storage) is distinct from variantSetNames (authored listOp metadata); the two lists are maintained independently
nested variantSets inside variants follow the same parent-child and child-list invariants
golden_groups: multiple variants under one variantSet, variantChildren maintenance
prim and property specs inside variants
variantSetChildren storage on the containing prim
variant specifier=over and unauthored typeName invariants
